note: Versioned imagery manifest. Every keyed image the app references lives here with its alt text and license/provenance. status 'ready' means the file is present and cleared to ship; 'pending' means the slot is declared and specced but the art has not been produced yet (the UI collapses it gracefully). The build-time guard in tests/images.test.mjs fails CI if a referenced key is missing, a 'ready' file is absent from disk, or an entry lacks alt/license — so a broken key surfaces at build time instead of a runtime 404.

hero-home.alt: A family pantry mid-week: cereal boxes, labeled bins, and water bottles on ordinary white shelves

license.note: Shoot per docs/asset-plan.md: a real consenting household, written permission before publishing, natural light, no staging.
